abilities.name: Homing Round
abilities.description: Fires a homing projectile that tracks the target.
abilities.notes: Movement locked during wind-up. In P&C mode, player chases target if out of range.

abilities.name: Heavy Round
abilities.description: Fires a large, slow straight projectile.
abilities.notes: Bigger and slower than Ranger Q due to 1.15x size multiplier.

abilities.name: Bulwark
abilities.input: Hold W (P&C) / Hold Shift (WASD), release to activate
abilities.description: Instantly grants Shield HP that absorbs damage before health.
abilities.notes: Shield is shown as a blue ring. Absorbed independently from health.

abilities.name: Buckshot
abilities.input: Hold E to charge, release to fire
abilities.description: Fires 5 projectiles in a fan spread.

abilities.name: Homing Round
abilities.description: Fires a homing projectile that tracks the target.
abilities.notes: Movement locked during wind-up. In P&C mode, player chases target if out of range.

abilities.name: Swift Shot
abilities.description: Fires a small, fast straight projectile.

abilities.name: Blink Step
abilities.input: Hold W (P&C) / Hold Shift (WASD), release to dash
abilities.notes: In P&C mode, dashes toward cursor clamped to max distance. Right-click cancels.

abilities.name: Burst Fire
abilities.input: Hold E to charge, release to fire
abilities.description: Fires 3 projectiles in sequence along the same direction.
abilities.notes: Can move while charging. Right-click cancels.
